title: The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook
content:

'''''The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook''''' was a roleplaying guide published by [[West End Games]] for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]. It was written by [[Bill Slavicsek]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann]], with a foreword by [[Timothy Zahn]]. It was first published in [[1996]].

The book summarizes and details the events of Zahn's [[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy|Thrawn Trilogy]] of novels, and describes the characters, [[Alien/Legends|aliens]], creatures, vehicles, [[Droid/Legends|droids]], [[Planet/Legends|planets]], and [[Starship/Legends|starships]] found therein. It integrates information from three other sourcebooks—the ''[[Heir to the Empire Sourcebook]]'', the ''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'', and ''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]''—into one volume, updated for the Second Edition rules.

{{Book-stub}}

==Contents==
*Foreword
*Introduction
*Chapter One: [[Thrawn campaign|Thrawn's Campaign]]
*[[Declaration of a New Republic/Legends|Declaration of a New Republic]]
*Chapter Two: The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]
*Chapter Three: [[The Force/Legends|The Force]]
*Chapter Four: Remnants of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]
*Chapter Five: The Fringe
*Chapter Six: Planets
*Chapter Seven: Aliens
*Chapter Eight: Creatures
*Chapter Nine: The [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]]
*Chapter Ten: [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]]
*Chapter Eleven: Equipment and Droids
**[[Model 608 Mega'puter]]
*Chapter Twelve: Vehicles
**[[Sleeper pod]]
*Chapter Thirteen: Starships
*Chapter Fourteen: Tactics and Battles
